{{Infobox concept
| name = Imperial
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Imperial]] is the language spoken by everyone in the world according to [[Jyrine]]'s tutors.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Imperial]] is a language heard among humans.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Imperial]] is the standardized language of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
